profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Formosa Ingredient Factory Tbk produces and sells beverage ingredients in Indonesia and internationally. The company offers tapioca pearls, jellies, jams, sauces, syrup, powder, and popping boba under the Bobaking brand name. It sells its products to restaurants, local coffee shops, international chain stores, and premium modern markets and retail. The company was founded in 2016 and is headquartered in Tangerang, Indonesia.
